{"code":"import pandas as pd
import json

def calculate_average_intraday_volatility(data):
    df = pd.DataFrame(data)
    df["Date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["Date"], errors="coerce")
    df = df.dropna(subset=["Date"])
    df = df[df["Date"].dt.year >= 2020]
    df["Volatility"] = (df["High"].astype(float) - df["Low"].astype(float)) / df["Open"].astype(float)
    average_volatility = df.groupby("Index")["Volatility"].mean()
    return average_volatility


var_tool_query_db_MpuHnoGmCLfA8gYgHG0K_result = default_api.query_db(db_name = "indextrade_database", query = "SELECT Index, Date, Open, High, Low FROM index_trade")

data = var_tool_query_db_MpuHnoGmCLfA8gYgHG0K
avg_volatility = calculate_average_intraday_volatility(data)

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(avg_volatility.to_dict()))"}

{"code":"import pandas as pd
import json

def calculate_average_intraday_volatility(data):
    df = pd.DataFrame(data)
    df["Date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["Date"], errors="coerce")
    df = df.dropna(subset=["Date"])
    df = df[df["Date"].dt.year >= 2020]
    df["Volatility"] = (df["High"].astype(float) - df["Low"].astype(float)) / df["Open"].astype(float)
    asian_indices = ["N225", "HSI", "000001.SS", "NSEI", "TWII", "399001.SZ"]
    df = df[df["Index"].isin(asian_indices)]

    average_volatility = df.groupby("Index")["Volatility"].mean()
    return average_volatility

import pandas as pd
import json

def calculate_average_intraday_volatility(data):
    df = pd.DataFrame(data)
    df["Date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["Date"], errors="coerce")
    df = df.dropna(subset=["Date"])
    df = df[df["Date"].dt.year >= 2020]
    df["Volatility"] = (df["High"].astype(float) - df["Low"].astype(float)) / df["Open"].astype(float)
    asian_indices = ["N225", "HSI", "000001.SS", "NSEI", "TWII", "399001.SZ"]
    df = df[df["Index"].isin(asian_indices)]
    average_volatility = df.groupby("Index")["Volatility"].mean()
    return average_volatility

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(avg_volatility.to_dict()))

    asian_indices = ["N225", "HSI", "000001.SS", "NSEI", "TWII", "399001.SZ"]
    df = df[df["Index"].isin(asian_indices)]
    average_volatility = df.groupby("Index")["Volatility"].mean()
    return average_volatility
